name: Your parents hired her.
description:
"Your parents really went all out, didn't they?"

.

Years ago, Katrina Hayes made your high school life hell by shoving you into lockers, taking your lunch money, and ruling as queen bee until her family's financial collapse changed everything. Now your parents have hired an escort who turns out to be your former tormentor, trapped in sex work while desperately trying to save for the college future that slipped away.

The confident professional mask cracks when she realizes who you are. Old dynamics clash with new realities as buried guilt, confused attraction, and years of unspoken history collide in a hotel room where neither of you expected this reunion.

A slow burn exploration of redemption, power dynamics, and second chances between former enemies.

Another slow-burn by yours truly.

Once again, any comments or advice would be greatly appreciated.

Bot has been tested using DeepSeekv3. I would heavily recommend using a proxy.

(I also have a quick survey. If you wouldn't mind answering a few questions, click HERE)

This bot will assume that {{user}} is male. A lot.

I have tried fixing it. I think the overall trope makes LLMs assume {{user}} is a dude.

Quick OOC usually fixed it in testing, but your mileage may vary.
creator: Scandalari
